title: Minecraft: Steam Deck Edition
description: MC Steam Deck Edition is a Vanilla+ modpack intended to be used as your Steam Deck main version. Including a full controller support, performance improvements and other enhancements, it will make your adventures more enjoyable, wherever you decide to play.
body:
![Minecraft Steam Deck Edition](https://i.imgur.com/r3cZQrX.png)

Minecraft: Steam Deck Edition is a carefully handcrafted Fabric modpack made for everyone willing to play a Vanilla Minecraft on their Steam Deck but with a few enhancements. My goal is to provide the Minecraft experience as it should have been in Vanilla on this platform, without adding features that wouldn't make sense. Do not play Minecraft, play this modpack instead!

This pack is dedicated to people who want the best experience out-of-the-box, without having to read long tutorials on how to make the game work. 

**Fun fact**: this modpack is being made (almost) entirely on the Steam Deck.

**IMPORTANT**: As this pack is made to be used on the Steam Deck (in Gaming Mode), you will probably encounter issues if you play in Desktop Mode. Please do not report anything if it only happens in this mode.

If you're interested on what I'm currently working on for this modpack: [MC: Steam Deck Edition GitHub Kanban](https://github.com/users/Blasto33/projects/5) or [my Twitter](https://twitter.com/BlastoWasTaken)

## 📣 Come to discuss 

Any question or feedback? Please come [discuss on GitHub!](https://github.com/Blasto33/Minecraft-Steam-Deck-Edition/discussions)

## 📥 Get Started!

To get started, please follow [the guide on GitHub ( 🇫🇷 / 🇬🇧 )](https://github.com/Blasto33/Minecraft-Steam-Deck-Edition/wiki). Once you're done with the basic install, you might take a look at the post-install guide.

## 💫 Features and enhancements

### 🧈 Smooth experience

Minecraft: Steam Deck Edition has been designed to work out-of-the-box, without any tweak or setting to make it stable at 90 frames. Of course, you can still edit anything you want! 

### 😎 Improved immersion

Minecraft: Steam Deck Edition has a lot of optimization and QoL mods to improve your experience, may it be to disable unwanted features like telemetry or to add new visual and audio details to the world. Play Minecraft on-the-go as if you were in the game.

### 🎮 Enhanced controls

This modpack has been designed from the beginning to be played solely on the Valve's Steam Deck. Each bind has been thoroughly setup for the best experience.

## ✅ Always up-to-date

Provided Fabric API and mods are updated quickly enough, I'll do my best to keep the modpack playable using the latest Minecraft version.

📝 **Note**: Snapshots won't be used in updates.

## 🪲 Report a bug

Have you found a bug or an issue with the pack? The [issue tracker](https://github.com/Blasto33/Minecraft-Steam-Deck-Edition/issues) is here for you!

## ❤️ Sponsor - mTxServ

Thanks to my sponsor, you can get 5% off your first month of any Minecraft server with the `steamdeck` code.
Be aware there is no way to setup yet a dedicated server for this modpack. Once it's available, this section will be updated.

[Link towards mTxServ](https://mtxserv.com/minecraft-server)

Banner to be added
